title: Agro's Fancy Fixes
description: Several changes and additions to Agro's Modpack.
body:
This mod is built for and around [Agro's Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/agropack/). Current additions: - **Disables Crafting Diamond Gear** - As the modpack makes use of FoxDen's Better Enchanting, which includes Diamond Upgrade Templates, Diamond Gear recipes have been disabled. - **Removes Iron Ingots from Iron Golems' Loot Tables** - Being geared for a rebalanced SMP, this nerf has been implemented to discourage players from building iron farms. - **Converts D&T Enchantments to their BetterEnchanting Essence equivalents** - Allows players to place Dungeons & Taverns' enchanted books in a crafting table to convert them into the respective Essence. - **Configuration & Wiki** - Uses MidnightConfig to allow players to configure the above settings at will, while also providing a page with information about each feature. - **Maintenance Mode & Whitelist** - Allows for the usage of a specific whitelist for testing things around the server without having to change the global whitelist. Can be set with `` /midnightconfig agros-fancy-fixes maintenance_mode ``

Like the mod? Support the developer! <3

Looking for a Modded SMP Developer/Manager? Reach out!

Most of my experience as a Minecraft Modder comes from setting up, hosting and managing Minecraft servers for friends, as well as developing context-specific mods for said servers.
Recently, I've taken a liking for providing this service professionally.
[Agro's Fancy Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/agros-fancy-fixes) and [Magmaphile](https://modrinth.com/mod/magmaphile) are two such examples - both of which made entirely for a [content creator's modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/agropack), hosted on a server managed by me.

If you'd like to start your own SMP, be it for friends or a large community, and either want to delegate the boring, menial tasks of setting it up and managing a server, or want consulting/assistance from someone experienced in handling modpacks, mod conflicts, and nuances of modded Minecraft, I can help you with it! You can contact me through the following:
Email - `malory@onenetbeyond.org`
Discord - `maloryware`
